ul.li: RFO (Request For Ownership): Every failed CAS causes a cache miss/invalidation.
UPI Latency: The cache line physically migrates across the CPU mesh/ring.
Throughput: $O(1/N)$ where $N$ is the number of contending producers.
State: Cache line enters Modified (M) state on Core 3.
Latency: Success typically takes ~40 cycles in zero-contention, up to 500+ cycles under high contention.
8 Producers: 87.5% failure rate per CAS attempt.
Interconnect Saturation: High frequency of MESI "Invalidate" and "Read-for-Ownership" packets saturates the memory bus.
